subject: A robed woman standing waist-deep in a pool beneath a waterfall, wearing gold jewelry, with cosmic starfield effects in the water
description: A female figure stands waist-deep in a still pool of water, partially turned to her right with her gaze directed downward. She wears a pale blue-white flowing off-shoulder dress and gold jewelry — a choker necklace and a bracelet are visible. Her hair is pulled up loosely with curling strands escaping at the sides. A tall cascade of white rushing water falls behind her, framing her in light. In the lower-left foreground, the water shimmers with a purple-pink cosmic or starfield glow — small bright points suggesting magic or the Underworld's presence bleeding into the living world. The overall mood is contemplative and quietly mysterious.
foreground: Woman in pale blue dress standing in water, looking downward, gold jewelry
background: White rushing waterfall, dark stone behind, pale mist
emotion: contemplative, serene — looking inward with quiet focus
